name: Indoor S'mores
recipeInstructions:
Makes 48 squares
1. Grease a 13x9x2" rectangular pan.
2. Heat corn syrup, butter and chocolate morsels to boiling in a 3-quart saucepan, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in vanilla.
4. Pour over cereal in a large mixing bowl; toss quickly until completely coated with chocolate.
5. Fold in marshmallows, 1 cup at a time.
6. Press mixture evenly in pan with a piece of waxed paper.
7. Let stand until firm, at least 1 hour.
8. Cut into 1-1/2 inch squares.
